query: SELECT afericao, COUNT(*) as total, ROUND(SUM(CAST(quantidade AS DECIMAL(12,3))), 3) as litros FROM vendas WHERE dataVenda >= '2026-02-06 00:00:00' AND dataVenda <= '2026-02-06 23:59:59' GROUP BY afericao;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 41wMkRgfnqozYTj.root --database GsoitYr3hHiyZTgQLwp9sV --execute SELECT afericao, COUNT(*) as total, ROUND(SUM(CAST(quantidade AS DECIMAL(12,3))), 3) as litros FROM vendas WHERE dataVenda >= '2026-02-06 00:00:00' AND dataVenda <= '2026-02-06 23:59:59' GROUP BY afericao;
